About

A mind built
for both worlds

Creative by nature and technical by training. I studied Computer Science with a focus on Software Engineering, where I discovered that design is the bridge between logic and emotion. I build visual identities, brand systems, and digital experiences that feel intentional — because every detail is.

My dual background means I don't just design beautifully — I design with a deep understanding of how things actually get built. From founding my own creative agency Mouret INK to curating art exhibitions, every project is an exercise in precision and storytelling.

I'm fluent in both Spanish and English (C1 Advanced), which means I bring the same precision to communication as I do to composition.
